headline: Brown Advisory Large-Cap Growth Strategy Sold CoStar Group (CSGP) Amid Declining Outlook
summary: Brown Advisory, an investment management company, released its “Brown Large-Cap Growth Strategy” for the first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Brown Advisory Large-Cap Growth Strategy experienced a decline in the first quarter of 2026, modestly trailing the Russell 1000 Growth Index. Despite negative absolute returns amidst volatility, […]

headline: CoStar Group's Q2 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: CoStar Group will release its second-quarter earnings soon, and analysts anticipate a triple-digit bottom-line growth.
